stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Given the following information, find the minimum possible Contingency Fuel for a Commercial Air Transport flight from DEP to DEST with a twin-jet aeroplane. (Note: The operator is approved for the use of basic fuel scheme WITH variations)

TAS: 450 kt
HWC (Head Wind): 50 kt
Fuel consumption en-route: 2000 kg/h
Fuel consumption in holding: 1200 kg/h
Aerodrome A is a suitable alternate.
